message:
feat: add bd promote command for wisp-to-bead promotion (gt-7mqd.9)

New command: bd promote <wisp-id> [--reason '...']
Sets ephemeral=false (preserving original ID) and adds a
"Promoted from Level 0: <reason>" comment. Supports daemon mode,
direct mode, and cross-rig routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: gastown/crew/jack
Rig: gastown
Role: crew
